'''lokathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keelat|keelat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keelat|keelat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lokathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lokathithi|lokathithi]] || [[word:lokathiji|lokathiji]] || [[word:lokathishi|lokathishi]] || [[word:lokathiki|lokathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lokathuthuthu|lokathuthuthu]] || [[word:lokathujuju|lokathujuju]] || [[word:lokathushushu|lokathushushu]] || [[word:lokathukuku|lokathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lokathuthu|lokathuthu]] || [[word:lokathuju|lokathuju]] || [[word:lokathushu|lokathushu]] || [[word:lokathuku|lokathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lokathufthuf|lokathufthuf]] || [[word:lokathufjuf|lokathufjuf]] || [[word:lokathufshuf|lokathufshuf]] || [[word:lokathufkuf|lokathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lokathethe|lokathethe]] || [[word:lokatheje|lokatheje]] || [[word:lokatheshe|lokatheshe]] || [[word:lokatheke|lokatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lokathothotho|lokathothotho]] || [[word:lokathojojo|lokathojojo]] || [[word:lokathoshosho|lokathoshosho]] || [[word:lokathokoko|lokathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lokathotho|lokathotho]] || [[word:lokathojo|lokathojo]] || [[word:lokathosho|lokathosho]] || [[word:lokathoko|lokathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lokathofthof|lokathofthof]] || [[word:lokathofjof|lokathofjof]] || [[word:lokathofshof|lokathofshof]] || [[word:lokathofkof|lokathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfthĂŻf|lokathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfjĂŻf|lokathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfshĂŻf|lokathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfkĂŻf|lokathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|lokathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|lokathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|lokathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|lokathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfthĂŻf|lokathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfjĂŻf|lokathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfshĂŻf|lokathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfkĂŻf|lokathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfthĂŻf|lokathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfjĂŻf|lokathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfshĂŻf|lokathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lokathĂŻfkĂŻf|lokathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lokathĂŠthĂŠ|lokathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lokathĂŠjĂŠ|lokathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lokathĂŠshĂŠ|lokathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lokathĂŠkĂŠ|lokathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lokathathatha|lokathathatha]] || [[word:lokathajaja|lokathajaja]] || [[word:lokathashasha|lokathashasha]] || [[word:lokathakaka|lokathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lokathatha|lokathatha]] || [[word:lokathaja|lokathaja]] || [[word:lokathasha|lokathasha]] || [[word:lokathaka|lokathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lokathafthaf|lokathafthaf]] || [[word:lokathafjaf|lokathafjaf]] || [[word:lokathafshaf|lokathafshaf]] || [[word:lokathafkaf|lokathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lokathasha|lokathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lokathshĂ«sha|lokathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lokathrosha|lokathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lokathmusha|lokathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lokathyasha|lokathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golokathnkshĂ«sha|golokathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golokathnkrosha|golokathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golokathnkmusha|golokathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golokathnkyasha|golokathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lokakathasha|lokakathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lokakathshĂ«sha|lokakathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lokakathrosha|lokakathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lokakathmusha|lokakathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lokakathyasha|lokakathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golokakathnkshĂ«sha|golokakathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golokakathnkrosha|golokakathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golokakathnkmusha|golokakathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golokakathnkyasha|golokakathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lekĂŠthasha|lekĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lekĂŠthshĂ«sha|lekĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lekĂŠthrosha|lekĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lekĂŠthmusha|lekĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lekĂŠthyasha|lekĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golekĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|golekĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golekĂŠthnkrosha|golekĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golekĂŠthnkmusha|golekĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golekĂŠthnkyasha|golekĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lokfathasha|lokfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lokfathshĂ«sha|lokfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lokfathrosha|lokfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lokfathmusha|lokfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lokfathyasha|lokfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golokfathnkshĂ«sha|golokfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golokfathnkrosha|golokfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golokfathnkmusha|golokfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golokfathnkyasha|golokfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
